stemHtml: What is one of the causes of the so-called night effect?

options.a: The difference in velocity of the EM-waves over land and over sea, at night.
options.b: A change in the direction of the plane of polarisation due to reflection in the ionosphere.
options.c: The absence of the surface wave at distances larger than the skip distance.
options.d: Interference between the ground and the space wave.
